topic: The vagus nerve: how breathing controls your nervous system
caption: Did you know your breathing can control your nervous system? 🌟 The vagus nerve is the key. It regulates your heart rate, digestion, and even your mood. 🧘‍♀️ Here are 5 ways to stimulate your vagus nerve through breathing: diaphragmatic breathing, box breathing, alternate nostril breathing, humming, and cold showers. ❄️ Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to relax. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. #vagusnerve #breathingexercises #nervousystem #relaxationtechniques #healthyliving #wellness
